name: Atlas Ambulette Inc
fleet_size_est: unknown (~10-12 vehicles inferred from employee count)
districts_or_customers: NYC Medicaid via Medical Answering Service; nursing homes, dialysis centers, hospitals across NYC and Long Island

name: Petermann
owner_or_parent: National Express LLC (NELLC) / National Express Group PLC - this is the Summit School Services platform itself (former Durham/National Express assets)
principals: Jeff Robertson (local Manager, Akron); originally founded by C.H. Petermann (1921); Settle family historic operators
fleet_size_est: 31+ routes for Akron Public Schools (local); ~1,400 employees across OH and PA
districts_or_customers: Akron Public Schools (5-year contract); multiple OH districts; PA operations
recent_news: Petermann is part of National Express School / NELLC; operates as branded subsidiary of the Summit platform (per task brief, Durham/National Express = Summit). Akron Public Schools 5-year contract renewed.
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET. Petermann is owned by National Express (NELLC), which is the Summit School Services platform itself. This is the platform, not a tuck-in candidate. Exclude from outreach.

name: Antelope Valley Sch Trnsprtn (AVSTA)
owner_or_parent: Joint Powers Authority (public agency) of three member school districts: Antelope Valley UHSD, Lancaster SD, Westside Union SD
principals: Morris Fuselier III (CEO) [data lists 'Morris Feasler III' - likely transliteration of Fuselier]; governed by a public Board of Directors
districts_or_customers: Antelope Valley Union High School District, Lancaster School District, Westside Union School District; ~6,000 students/day on 88 SPED + 41 regular ed routes
recent_news: Partnered with BYD on battery-electric school bus deployment; received $11M+ in grants since 1993 for clean buses/fueling infrastructure
fit_notes: NOT A TARGET. AVSTA is a public Joint Powers Authority owned by three CA school districts - not a private operator and not acquirable. Exclude.

name: Crawford Bus Svc Inc
owner_or_parent: Cook-Illinois Corporation (Benish family; John Benish Jr., President) - largest US family-owned school bus contractor, ~2,200 buses, 18 subsidiaries
principals: Bill Chadwick listed as Owner in source data (likely legacy/local manager); Benish family controls Cook-Illinois parent
fleet_size_est: unknown for Crawford unit; Cook-Illinois total ~2,200 buses
districts_or_customers: Illinois school districts (Crawford unit per Cook-Illinois rebranded as Grand Prairie Transit - Lockport, serving Valley View District 365U); listed Watseka, IL address suggests Iroquois County operations
recent_news: Cook-Illinois has been rebranding subsidiaries (Crawford Bus Service rebranded to Grand Prairie Transit - Lockport); company has expanded propane/autogas fleet
fit_notes: NOT A STANDALONE TARGET. Crawford Bus Service is a subsidiary of Cook-Illinois Corporation (Benish family, ~2,200 buses, top-10 US contractor). Could be approached only as part of platform-level conversation with Cook-Illinois (parent itself a potential strategic combination, not a tuck-in).
